# Governance

The project is maintainer-led during pre-1.0 development.

The maintainer owns:

- release readiness
- security policy
- LibreOffice extension compatibility decisions
- dependency policy
- cryptographic protocol acceptance

Major changes to encryption, transport behavior, or LibreOffice packaging require explicit maintainer review.
